title: Complete checkout and see order success
description: A shopper can submit a pickup order with required details and receive a successful order confirmation with an invoice number.

steps.description: Add a product to the cart
Verify an order success confirmation is visible
Verify an invoice number is displayed

title: Place an order successfully with customer details
description: A shopper can fill required checkout details, review the order summary, submit the order, and reach the success confirmation with an invoice number.

steps.description: Fill customer name with a valid value
Fill WhatsApp number with a valid value
Verify the order success confirmation is visible
Verify an invoice number is displayed

title: Add a product to the cart from browsing
description: A shopper can add a product from the catalog and see the cart summary update.

steps.description: Click a product card to add it to the cart
Verify the sticky cart summary is displayed
Verify the cart item count increases

title: Show store catalog with header and products
description: A shopper can open a store page and see the store header, catalog, and stock indicators needed to start browsing.

steps.description: Verify the store header is displayed
Verify the product catalog is displayed
Verify stock indicators are displayed for products

title: Continue from cart to checkout
description: A shopper can move from the cart review step into the checkout form.

steps.description: Add a product to the cart
Verify the checkout form is displayed
Verify the cart summary is still available during checkout

title: Open the cart and review items
description: A shopper can open the cart and review the items, quantities, and totals before checkout.

steps.description: Add a product to the cart
Verify the cart subtotal summary is displayed

title: Filter products by category
description: A shopper can narrow the catalog by category and see only matching products.

steps.description: Verify the product list is updated to show matching products
Verify the selected category filter is active

title: Search for a product by name
description: A shopper can search the catalog by product name and see matching results.

steps.description: Fill in the search field with a product name
Verify non-matching products are not shown

title: Update cart quantities and remove an item
description: A shopper can increase, decrease, and remove cart items while seeing the cart summary change accordingly.

steps.description: Add a product to the cart
Decrease the item quantity until it is removed
Verify the item is removed from the cart
Verify the cart summary reflects the updated total

title: Search orders by WhatsApp number
description: A customer can enter a WhatsApp number and view matching orders with their key details in order tracking.

steps.description: Verify order invoices and status details are displayed

title: Return from success to order tracking
description: A shopper can move from the order success screen to order tracking and review the submitted order state.

steps.description: Add a product to the cart
Open order tracking from the success screen
Verify the order tracking view is displayed
Verify the submitted order appears in tracking

title: Cancel a newly placed order from tracking
description: A customer can cancel an order that is still newly placed and see the cancellation reflected in tracking.

steps.description: Verify the order is shown as cancelled

title: Clear the cart
description: A shopper can clear all cart items and return to an empty cart state.

steps.description: Add a product to the cart
Verify the empty cart state is displayed

title: Prevent submitting checkout with an empty cart
description: Checkout shows validation feedback when the cart is empty and the user tries to place an order.

steps.description: Fill customer name with a valid value
Fill WhatsApp number with a valid value
Verify a cart required validation error is visible

title: Require WhatsApp number before submitting checkout
description: Checkout shows validation feedback when the WhatsApp number is left empty and the order is not submitted.

steps.description: Fill customer name with a valid value
Verify a required WhatsApp validation error is visible

title: Require customer name before submitting checkout
description: Checkout shows validation feedback when the customer name is left empty and the order is not submitted.

steps.description: Fill WhatsApp number with a valid value
Verify a required name validation error is visible

title: Cancel an eligible online order from tracking
description: A customer can cancel an order that is still eligible for cancellation from the tracking view.

steps.description: Search for an order with an eligible status
Verify the order status is updated after cancellation
Verify the order no longer appears as active

title: Open order tracking from order success
description: After a successful order, the customer can go directly to order tracking from the confirmation screen.

steps.description: Fill customer name with a valid value
Fill WhatsApp number with a valid value
Open order tracking from the success screen
Verify the order tracking view is displayed

title: Browse the landing page and open the APK download link
description: An anonymous visitor can view the NUSA landing page branding and follow the APK download link.

steps.description: Verify the landing page branding is displayed
Verify a download link is available

title: Return to browsing from order success
description: After a successful order, the customer can return to product browsing from the confirmation screen.

steps.description: Fill customer name with a valid value
Fill WhatsApp number with a valid value
Return to browsing from the success screen
Verify the product browsing view is displayed

title: Show validation when checkout is incomplete
description: A shopper sees validation feedback when required checkout details are missing.

steps.description: Add a product to the cart
Submit the order without filling the required fields
Verify the order is not submitted

title: Browse an out-of-stock product and add it to cart
description: A shopper can still see an out-of-stock product and add it to the cart as shown by the current UI behavior.

steps.description: Locate a product marked as out of stock
Click the out-of-stock product card to add it to the cart
Verify the cart summary updates after adding the product
Verify the out-of-stock product remains visible in the catalog

title: Show no-results state when tracking finds no orders
description: Order tracking shows an empty state when a searched WhatsApp number has no matching orders.

steps.description: Enter a WhatsApp number with no matching orders
Verify a no-results message is visible

title: Cancel is unavailable for non-new orders
description: Order tracking does not offer cancellation for orders that are already beyond the newly placed status.

steps.description: Verify non-new order statuses are displayed
Verify no cancellation option is shown for those orders
